Weapon Preference: Rail Gun with Ion weapons
Research Preference: Power and Shields

The race originally called Ortain were a small grey-skinned reptilian race. The Ortain created machines in their own image specifically to do jobs and work such as war that an Ortain could not do as efficiently.

The machines were created with complex AI and eventually were regarded as full members of the Ortain race. The Ortain machines shared most of the same laws and had positions of power where they were suited.

Some event not described by history saw the Ortain wiped out as a species. However the AI created by the Ortain lived on and filled the gaps in the jobs and power structure left by the death of their biological counterparts.

The machine Ortain were built for war and do not have feelings regarding comfort or personal space, this has allowed them to develop the Compact Troop Compartment, a smaller way to carry large amounts of infantry on their ships.

The machine Ortain are very paranoid and can be very insular in behavior. They are badly equipped for diplomacy or co-habitation with other species. Often, Ortain fall back on their combative programming, considering it their job to subdue other races.
